description: Use this API to set substation node character extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = set_ext_subnode_char(isub, inode, string, cval)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension subnode field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘CVAL’ not set.
Unknown error with data access; ‘CVAL’ not set.
API Prereqs not met; ‘CVAL’ not set.
